title: Seva ya Utils
description: A utility mod for Seva ya Season 6, includes the server shop, milestones and custom currency
body:
Adds milestones into the game that the players can access with ```/milestone```

Changes Wandering Traders to get their trades based on the current main milestone level

Also adds sevayic shards/clusters/gems

Don't forget to install the mod disabler datapacks and enable them at the start
